indicators.name: bed
indicators.rationale: The bed is not suitable for computer work due to its height and lack of a flat surface.

indicators.name: lack of flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for setting up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No ergonomic seating is available for comfortable long-term use.

indicators.name: no task lighting
indicators.rationale: There is no task lighting to reduce eye strain and provide good visibility for screen work.

indicators.name: high-traffic public layout
indicators.rationale: The layout is high-traffic and public, making it unsuitable for focused solo work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The absence of a flat personal work surface, ergonomic seating, and task lighting, along with the high-traffic public layout, makes it difficult to set up a productive workstation. However, the presence of a bed suggests that some level of comfort is possible, albeit not ideal for extended periods.
